## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. Which model/strategy or area does this touch? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Routing stays **by host model, not by task** (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] No chat-template tokens or internal mechanics written as prompt content
      (`[INST]`, `<<SYS>>`, `<think>`, header tokens, etc.).
- [ ] Any strategy change cites a **real, current official** source, and the link resolves.
- [ ] Strategy files stay short and model-specific (~300–450 tokens).
- [ ] READMEs kept in sync across `README.md`, `README.en.md`, and `README.zh.md`.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` routing table and the README strategy tables agree.
